drift_candidates.config_says: boards_v0_3.yaml board3 (板块三·中国政策法规) sources = Google News by-ministry aggregation + RSSHub gov route (all official:false)
drift_candidates.worker_does: worker_cloud.js hardcodes radar/China sources including Google News + 人民网(x2) + 中国新闻网 + 新浪 (lines 36-51)
drift_candidates.delta: worker adds 人民网/中国新闻网/新浪 which are NOT in board3 config; config's per-ministry Google News queries + RSSHub route are not the live worker set -> single-source-of-truth violation
drift_candidates.authority: worker_cloud.js is the deployed live source; boards_v0_3.yaml is the registry that should match it
drift_candidates.resolution_owner: later S1/S2 source-truth task (out of scope for T005 which only records the drift)

coexisting: J5_cloud_native (line ~120): 网页即主体，整套系统跑云端，不依赖 Mac；全路由实测 200
R6 (line ~168): phone_access_full_system_via_tunnel_with_mirror_fallback — 旧 Cloudflare Tunnel + 本机镜像回落设计
drift_candidates.delta: STATUS.yaml simultaneously records the current cloud-native state (J5) and the retired tunnel/Mac-mirror state (R6) without marking R6 superseded -> contradictory status record
drift_candidates.resolution_owner: later governance-consistency task (T005 only records; not fixed here)
